feed.title: SRAM XX / XX SL Transmission (MTB)
feed.subtitle: XX and XX SL T-Type rear derailleurs.

entry.title: XX DH AXS Transmission RD (RD-XX-DHE-A1) — firmware 2.54.6
entry.summary:
XX DH AXS Transmission RD RD-XX-DHE-A1 — firmware 2.54.6

Part: RD TopGun DH

Initial Public Release

Released: 2026-02-24

entry.title: XX SL Special Edition RD (RD-87-E-A1) — firmware 2.54.2
entry.summary:
XX SL Special Edition RD RD-87-E-A1 — firmware 2.54.2

Part: RD XX SL Di2 Defense

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: XX RD (RD-XX-E-B1) — firmware 2.54.2
entry.summary:
XX RD RD-XX-E-B1 — firmware 2.54.2

Part: RD TopGun T1 Trail

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: XX SL RD (RD-XX-SLE-B1) — firmware 2.54.2

Released: 2025-09-19

entry.title: XX RD (RD-XX-E-B1) — firmware 2.53.8
entry.summary:
XX RD RD-XX-E-B1 — firmware 2.53.8

Part: RD TopGun T1 Trail

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following enhancements. -This firmware update contains reduced Cassette Mapping shift intervals for multi-shift.

Released: 2025-09-19

entry.title: XX SL RD (RD-XX-SLE-B1) — firmware 2.53.8

entry.title: XX RD (RD-XX-E-B1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
XX RD RD-XX-E-B1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: RD TopGun T1 Trail

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-09

entry.title: XX SL Special Edition RD (RD-87-E-A1) — firmware 2.52.3
entry.summary:
XX SL Special Edition RD RD-87-E-A1 — firmware 2.52.3

Part: RD XX SL Di2 Defense

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following enhancements. -This firmware contains improved shift intervals for cassette mapping and multi-shift. -Initial Public Release.

Released: 2025-09-09

entry.title: XX RD (RD-XX-E-B1) — firmware 2.41.1
entry.summary:
XX RD RD-XX-E-B1 — firmware 2.41.1

Part: RD TopGun T1 Trail

General bug fixes and reliability improvements. General improvements to Ant+ gear position and battery status reporting. Added support for MicroAdjust using the AXS App.

Released: 2022-12-14

entry.title: XX SL RD (RD-XX-SLE-B1) — firmware 2.41.1
entry.summary:
XX SL RD RD-XX-SLE-B1 — firmware 2.41.1

Released: 2022-12-14

entry.title: XX1 RD (RD-XX-1E-A1) — firmware 2.41.1
entry.summary:
XX1 RD RD-XX-1E-A1 — firmware 2.41.1

Part: RD XX1

General bug fixes and reliability improvements. General improvements to Ant+ gear position and battery status reporting. Added support for MicroAdjust using the AXS App.

Released: 2022-12-14

entry.title: XX RD (RD-XX-E-B1) — firmware 2.35.0
entry.summary:
XX RD RD-XX-E-B1 — firmware 2.35.0

Part: RD TopGun T1 Trail

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Support for MicroAdjust using the AXS App on MTB RD´s - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - Minor improvements to battery life

Released: 2022-04-21

entry.title: XX SL RD (RD-XX-SLE-B1) — firmware 2.35.0
entry.summary:
XX SL RD RD-XX-SLE-B1 — firmware 2.35.0

Part: RD TopGun T1 Race

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Support for MicroAdjust using the AXS App on MTB RD´s - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - Minor improvements to battery life

Released: 2022-04-21

entry.title: XX1 RD (RD-XX-1E-A1) — firmware 2.35.0
entry.summary:
XX1 RD RD-XX-1E-A1 — firmware 2.35.0

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Support for MicroAdjust using the AXS App on MTB RD´s - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - Minor improvements to battery life

Released: 2022-04-21
